data.body:
## Gap Analysis Amendment

### .test-index entry clarification
The existing tdd.md entry maps to 3 test files on one comma-separated line. Do NOT modify that line. Add a NEW separate line for the RED marker:
`plugins/dso/skills/implementation-plan/docs/reviewers/plan/tdd.md: tests/skills/test_implementation_plan_tdd_reviewer.py [test_tdd_reviewer_bidirectional_dimension]`

This avoids affecting the existing entry and its associated tests.
